title: Lines of Evangelion expo
wikitext: []: Lines of Evangelion expo             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Sep 08, 2025 10:43 am Just bringing over more content from our Korean friendos. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) These are about a fifth of pics I took(rough guessing). There are more in my album, and much more in the exhibit that I didn't photograph All of them were from Rebuilds, and I think maybe more than 70% were from 3.0 and 4.0 Dedicated corners for each of the five pilots. Gay piano scene. Angels Random notes: a lot of normies who came with their weeb partner. People very noticeably skipping Mari's section. Girls complaining at 28 Shinji face jump scare(6.jpg this one jumps on your sight right after you walk around a corner)

Article: Lines of Evangelion expo
[]: Lines of Evangelion expo             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Mon Sep 08, 2025 10:43 am Just bringing over more content from our Korean friendos. tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) These are about a fifth of pics I took(rough guessing). There are more in my album, and much more in the exhibit that I didn't photograph All of them were from Rebuilds, and I think maybe more than 70% were from 3.0 and 4.0 Dedicated corners for each of the five pilots. Gay piano scene. Angels Random notes: a lot of normies who came with their weeb partner. People very noticeably skipping Mari's section. Girls complaining at 28 Shinji face jump scare(6.jpg this one jumps on your sight right after you walk around a corner)
